hub.subtitle.en: Functional Behavior Assessment, ABC data collection, and Behavior Intervention Plan tools.
hub.subtitle.tr: Kein jerbal ñan Functional Behavior Assessment, aini ABC data, im Behavior Intervention Plan.

hub.abc_desc.en: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
hub.abc_desc.tr: Jeje antecedent, ṃwilin, im consequence ko jān lale

hub.interval_desc.en: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
hub.interval_desc.tr: Grid ñan time sampling: partial, whole, ak momentary

hub.hypothesis_desc.en: Visual A→B→C→Function flow chart with AI generation
hub.hypothesis_desc.tr: Visual A→B→C→Function flow chart kōṃṃane jān AI

hub.contract_desc.tr: AI ej je behavior agreement ikōtaan ri-jikuuḷ im ri-kaki

hub.triangulation_desc.tr: Keidi 3+ unin data ñan lo convergence

hub.gas_desc.en: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.gas_desc.tr: Goal Attainment Scaling ippān descriptor ko jān AI

hub.pocket_desc.en: Compact index-card BIP summary for clipboard carry
hub.pocket_desc.tr: BIP summary ekanooj edik āinwōt index-card ñan bōk ilo clipboard

hub.abagraph_desc.en: Publication-standard graphs with phase lines, trend lines, and visual analysis
hub.abagraph_desc.tr: Jaat ko rekkar ñan publication ippān phase line, trend line, im visual analysis

hub.bcbahandoff_desc.en: Data dashboard for BCBAs + printable handoff packet for consultation
hub.bcbahandoff_desc.tr: Dashboard in data ñan BCBA + handoff packet emaroñ kabbōj ñan jipañ

hub.casestudy_desc.en: AI-generated case studies with 4-phase clinical reasoning and scoring
hub.casestudy_desc.tr: Case study ko jān AI ippān 4-phase clinical reasoning im scoring

hub.condprob_desc.en: Foreground vs background probability analysis to validate ABC hypotheses with data
hub.condprob_desc.tr: Etale foreground vs background probability ñan kaṃṃool ABC hypothesis ippān data

hub.counseling_desc.en: AI role-play with student personas for counseling practice
hub.counseling_desc.tr: Role-play kōn AI ippān persona in ri-jikuuḷ ñan kōkātak counseling

hub.cumrecord_desc.en: Classic Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — the heritage of ABA data display
hub.cumrecord_desc.tr: Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — jolet eo an ABA data display

hub.drstrategy_desc.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.drstrategy_desc.tr: Kāālōt differential reinforcement strategy eo ejejjet (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)

hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training — jeje trial-by-trial ippān mastery criteria im auto-advance

hub.fcttemplate_desc.en: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Functional Communication Training karōk ippān kāālōt in modality

hub.iepprep_desc.en: AI-generated meeting preparation packet with data summary, talking points, and next steps
hub.iepprep_desc.tr: Packet in pojak ñan meeting jān AI ippān data summary, talking point, im juon ko reitok

hub.ioacalc_desc.en: Inter-Observer Agreement with 6 methods — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.ioacalc_desc.tr: Inter-Observer Agreement kōn 6 wāween — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count

hub.latency_desc.en: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
hub.latency_desc.tr: Joñe iien jān stimulus ñan response ippān mean, median, im range

hub.maintenance_desc.en: Track skill retention post-mastery and generalization across settings, people, and materials
hub.maintenance_desc.tr: Lale skill retention ālikin mastery im generalization ilo jikin, armej, im men ko

hub.mtss_desc.en: Visual 3-tier pyramid for managing multi-tiered supports with AI-powered tier placement recommendations
hub.mtss_desc.tr: Visual 3-tier pyramid ñan jipañ multi-tiered supports ippān tier placement jipañ jān AI

hub.prefassess_desc.en: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.prefassess_desc.tr: Kile reinforcer ilo wāween rejejjet — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, im Free Operant protocol

hub.progressreport_desc.en: AI-generated progress reports with data summaries, trend analysis, goal progress, and parent-friendly language option
hub.progressreport_desc.tr: Progress report ko jān AI ippān data summary, trend analysis, goal progress, im naan ñan ri-utiej

hub.selfcheck_desc.en: Student-facing mood check-in and reflection journal — capturing their voice
hub.selfcheck_desc.tr: Mood check-in im reflection journal ñan ri-jikuuḷ — ñan roñjake aer ainikien

hub.socialvalidity_desc.en: TARF and IRP-15 scales for measuring treatment acceptability — required for publication
hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: TARF im IRP-15 scale ñan joñe an mālim treatment — aikuj ñan publication

hub.taskanalysis_desc.en: Break skills into teachable steps with forward, backward, or total-task chaining and prompt tracking
hub.taskanalysis_desc.tr: Aikuj skill ñan jekjek emaroñ katakin ippān forward, backward, ak total-task chaining im prompt tracking

hub.treatintegrity_desc.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: Jeje eḷaññe intervention ko rej etal āinwōt karōk — component-level fidelity tracking (treatment adherence)

hub.bipgen_desc.en: Draft a Behavior Intervention Plan from your data.
hub.bipgen_desc.tr: Je juon Behavior Intervention Plan jān aṃ data.

hub.practicum_desc.en: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
hub.practicum_desc.tr: Etale juon guided practice case jān jino ñan jeṃḷọk.

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: Uññūr juon cell ñan kalōñ. Klik routine name ñan ukōte.

quick_fill_label.tr: 🧠 Quick-Fill — Kwaḷọk ta eo eaḷ waḷọk

quiz_replacement.tr: Ta eo ej juon ṃwilin pinej jenkwan (replacement behavior)?

ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.en: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.tr: Kobaḷọk juon kakōḷḷe an team eo... (Shift+Enter ñan juon laajrak ekāāl)

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: joñak: "Ej ke juon token economy kadikḷọk off-task behavior ilo iien katakin math?"

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: joñak: "ri-jikuuḷ eo ewōr an autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "ekāāl ñan jikuuḷ in"

toast.autofilled_n_baseline_n_interventi.tr: Eṃōj-make-kobrak: N baseline + N intervention points jān "N"

toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de.tr: Eṃōj case study! Etale debrief eo aṃ.

toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no.tr: 🎉 Eṃōj DRO interval — KAPEN! Ejjeḷọk target behavior eaar waḷọk!

toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p.tr: Kajjojo phase ej aikuj rōḷap iiō ruo data points

toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: Eṃōj likūt effect sizes ñan IEP Prep!

toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Graph data attached to IEP Prep!

toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl.tr: Pojak graph data — make-kobrak ej pād ilo Effect Size!

toast.merged_n_abc_entries_and_n_observa.tr: Eṃōj koba N ABC entries im N observations

toast.n_home_entries_pushed_to_abc_data.en: N home entries pushed to ABC data ✅
toast.n_home_entries_pushed_to_abc_data.tr: Eṃōj jilkinḷọk N home entries ñan ABC data ✅

toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.en: Name at least one target behavior
toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.tr: Likūt etan rōḷap juon target behavior

toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.en: Need at least 2 data points per phase
toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.tr: Eaikuj rōḷap iiō ruo data points kajjojo phase

toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.tr: Eaikuj rōḷap iiō ruo phase ilo Graph eo (baseline + intervention)

toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file.tr: Ejjab juon AlloFlow snapshot file ejejjet

toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file.tr: Ejjab juon consent template file ejejjet

toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_.en: Pop-ups blocked — downloaded as HTML file instead.
toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_.tr: Eṃōj bōbrae pop-ups — eṃōj download āinwōt juon HTML file.

toast.quick_fill_n_items_loaded.tr: Quick Fill: Eṃōj load N men ⚡

toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_.en: Report generated — use Print/Save as PDF in the new tab!
toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_.tr: Eṃōj kōṃṃan report — kōjerbal Print/Save as PDF ilo tab eo ekāāl!

toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i.en: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i.tr: Speech recognition ejjab jerbal ilo browser in

toast.autofilled_from_phase_tagged_entri.tr: Kar make-kanne jān entries ko ewōr aer phase tag.

toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.en: Need at least 2 baseline and 2 intervention entries with phase tags.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.tr: Aikuj ulōñ 2 baseline im 2 intervention entries ewōr aer phase tags.

toast.snapshot_rejected_entries.en: Skipped ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} malformed entries (missing/invalid timestamp or wrong field types). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} valid entries kept for review.
toast.snapshot_rejected_entries.tr: Kar kāālōt ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} entries ko rejjab jiṃwe (eḷḷaḷḷap/jab-jiṃwe timestamp ak field types ko rebōd). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} entries ko rejiṃwe rej pād wōt ñan etale.

toast.share_code_too_large.en: Snapshot too large for share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, limit 5,000). Use 💾 Download Snapshot instead.
toast.share_code_too_large.tr: Snapshot eḷḷap im jab tōllọk ñan kakkien kōjjeḷọk (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, joñan eo 5,000). Kōjerbal 💾 Download Snapshot ijo jeḷā.

ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r.en: Add ABC entries before generating a report.
ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r.tr: Kobaiki ABC entries ṃokta jān aṃ kōṃṃan report.

ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.en: Add ABC entries to see visual trend data.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.tr: Kobaiki ABC entries ñan lo data in trend in alikkar.

ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da.en: Add data points above or paste CSV data to get started.
ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da.tr: Kobaiki data points ilōñ ak likūt CSV data ñan jino.

ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.tr: Kāālōt strategy in differential reinforcement eo ejejjet

ui.click_ai_generate_checklist_to_create.en: Click "AI Generate Checklist" to create items based on the BIP
ui.click_ai_generate_checklist_to_create.tr: Kaḷōke "AI Generate Checklist" ñan kōṃṃan items ko pedped ioon BIP

ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.en: Click "Load Student Workspaces" and select multiple .json files saved from BehaviorLens
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.tr: Kaḷōke "Load Student Workspaces" im kāālōt elōñ .json files ko kar kọjjeḷọki jān BehaviorLens

ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio.en: Create your first replacement behavior plan.
ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio.tr: Kōṃṃan aṃ ṃokta replacement behavior plan.

ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.en: Discrete Trial Training with mastery tracking and auto-advance
ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.tr: Discrete Trial Training kōn mastery tracking im auto-advance

ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.en: Enter data or record sessions to generate a cumulative record.
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.tr: Kobaiki data ak record sessions ñan kōṃṃan juon cumulative record.

ui.functional_communication_training_pla.tr: Kein jerbal in karōk ñan Functional Communication Training

ui.generate_a_multiweek_intervention_pla.en: Generate a multi-week intervention plan based on your collected ABC data and AI analysis.
ui.generate_a_multiweek_intervention_pla.tr: Kōṃṃan juon plan in intervention iuṃwin elōñ wiik pedped ioon aṃ ABC data im AI analysis.

ui.generate_a_professional_printready_pr.en: Generate a professional, print-ready progress report with inline charts, data summaries, and AI recommendations. One-click PDF export via browser print.
ui.generate_a_professional_printready_pr.tr: Kōṃṃan juon report in wōnṃaanḷọk eṃṃan, ekkar ñan print, ewōr aer charts, kadu in data, im AI recommendations. Juon-click PDF export ilo browser print.

ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa.en: Generate compliant IEP behavioral goals from observation data with present levels, SMART goals, and progress monitoring.
ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa.tr: Kōṃṃan IEP behavioral goals ko rejejjet jān observation data im ewōr present levels, SMART goals, im wōnṃaanḷọk monitoring.

ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring.en: Generate IEP-ready progress monitoring paragraphs from your accumulated behavioral data.
ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring.tr: Kōṃṃan IEP-ready paragraphs in wōnṃaanḷọk monitoring jān aṃ behavioral data eo kar kobaiki.

ui.load_multiple_student_workspace_files.en: Load multiple student workspace files to compare behavior patterns, intensity levels, and trends side-by-side.
ui.load_multiple_student_workspace_files.tr: Load elōñ files in student workspace ñan keidi wāween mwil, joñan kajoor, im trends side-by-side.

ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_.en: No entries yet. Tap "Log a Behavior" to get started!
ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_.tr: Ejjañin wōr entries. Uññūr "Log a Behavior" ñan jino!

ui.no_session_data_recorded_yet.tr: Ejjañin wōr session data kar record.

ui.no_team_notes_yet_start_the_conversat.en: No team notes yet. Start the conversation!
ui.no_team_notes_yet_start_the_conversat.tr: Ejjañin wōr team notes. Jino kōnnaan eo!

ui.or_explore_the_pd_learning_path.en: Or explore the PD Learning Path →

ui.paste_one_value_per_line_supports_for.en: Paste one value per line. Supports formats: "5", "Session 1: 5", or "1,5"
ui.paste_one_value_per_line_supports_for.tr: Likūt juon value ilo juon laajrak. Ej jerbal kōn formats: "5", "Session 1: 5", ak "1,5"

ui.please_use_chrome_edge_or_safari_for_.en: Please use Chrome, Edge, or Safari for voice input.
ui.please_use_chrome_edge_or_safari_for_.tr: Jouj im kōjerbal Chrome, Edge, ak Safari ñan voice input.

ui.practice_clinical_reasoning_with_aige.en: Practice clinical reasoning with AI-generated case studies. Get expert-level feedback on your responses.
ui.practice_clinical_reasoning_with_aige.tr: Kamminene clinical reasoning kōn case studies ko AI ear kōṃṃani. Bōk expert-level uwaak ñan aṃ uwaak.

ui.publicationstandard_singlecase_design.tr: Graphs in single-case design ekkar ñan publication-standard

ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.en: Record sessions with the Session Data Tracker, or switch to Manual Entry mode.
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.tr: Record sessions kōn Session Data Tracker, ak oktak ñan Manual Entry mode.

ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure.en: Select a research design to structure your data collection
ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure.tr: Kāālōt juon research design ñan kōṃṃan struktur ñan aṃ kobaik data

ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member.en: Share workspace data with team members. Role-based views filter data appropriately for BCBAs, teachers, and parents.
ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member.tr: Kakkien workspace data ippān ri-team ro. Role-based views rej kāālōt data ko rejejjet ñan BCBAs, ri-kaki, im jinen im jemen.

ui.track_behavior_frequency_over_time_wi.en: Track behavior frequency over time with aim lines, phase changes, and trend analysis.
ui.track_behavior_frequency_over_time_wi.tr: Track frequency in mwil ilo iien kōn aim lines, phase changes, im etale trend.

ui.track_your_feelings_earn_badges_and_b.en: Track your feelings, earn badges, and build streaks!
ui.track_your_feelings_earn_badges_and_b.tr: Track eññjake ko aṃ, bōk badges, im kalōk streaks!

ui.visual_multitiered_system_of_supports.en: Visual multi-tiered system of supports. Assign students to tiers, get AI-powered placement recommendations.
ui.visual_multitiered_system_of_supports.tr: Visual multi-tiered system of supports. Likūt ri-jikuuḷ ñan tiers, bōk AI-powered recommendations in likūt.

allobot_chat.empty_title.en: Ask me anything about behavior analysis!

intervention.title.tr: Ri-Kōṃṃan Plan in Intervention eo AI

raw.compare_current_data_to_baseline_lev.tr: Keidi data eo kiiō ippān ḷōñūn baseline

raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a.tr: Kōṃṃane juon Functional Behavior Assessment ej dedeḷok

raw.develop_an_individualized_behavior_i.en: Develop an individualized Behavior Intervention Plan
raw.develop_an_individualized_behavior_i.tr: Ejaak juon Behavior Intervention Plan ekkar ñan armej eo make

raw.document_baseline_frequency_for_flag.en: Document baseline frequency for flagged students
raw.document_baseline_frequency_for_flag.tr: Jeje baseline frequency ñan ri-jikuuḷ ro raar kakōḷḷeik

raw.document_the_hypothesis_in_session_n.en: Document the hypothesis in session notes
raw.document_the_hypothesis_in_session_n.tr: Jeje hypothesis eo ilo notes in jenkwōn

raw.identify_12_functionally_equivalent_.tr: Kile 1–2 ṃwil in pinej jenkwa ko functionally equivalent

raw.identify_students_exceeding_the_univ.tr: Kile ri-jikuuḷ ro reeḷḷā jān threshold eo universal

raw.plan_a_reinforcement_schedule_for_re.en: Plan a reinforcement schedule for replacement behaviors
raw.plan_a_reinforcement_schedule_for_re.tr: Karōk juon schedule in reinforcement ñan ṃwil in pinej jenkwa ko

raw.plan_data_collection_methods_and_fre.en: Plan data collection methods and frequency
raw.plan_data_collection_methods_and_fre.tr: Karōk wāween aini data im frequency

raw.ready_to_generate_hypothesis_diagram.tr: Pojak ñan kōṃṃane diagram in hypothesis

raw.review_existing_data_supporting_the_.en: Review existing data supporting the hypothesis
raw.review_existing_data_supporting_the_.tr: Etale data eo ej pād kiiō im rejetake hypothesis eo

raw.review_progress_monitoring_data_vs_b.tr: Etale data in progress monitoring vs. baseline

raw.run_ai_analysis_on_collected_data.en: Run AI Analysis on collected data
raw.run_ai_analysis_on_collected_data.tr: Kōjjeḷā AI Analysis ioon data ko ar aini

raw.set_review_dates_and_checkin_schedul.en: Set review dates and check-in schedule
raw.set_review_dates_and_checkin_schedul.tr: Likūt raan in etale im schedule in check-in

raw.view_trend_dashboard_with_your_data.en: View trend dashboard with your data
raw.view_trend_dashboard_with_your_data.tr: Lale dashboard in trend ippān data eo aṃ

raw.you_have_enough_data_for_ai_analysis.tr: Eṃōj aṃ bōk bwe data ñan AI analysis

dq.tip_antecedent_types.tr: Ewōr juon range eṃṃan in kain antecedent ko ar lale.

dq.tip_great_volume.en: Great volume of entries for analysis.
dq.tip_great_volume.tr: Volume eḷap an entry ko ñan analysis.

fba.step_hypothesis_desc.tr: Jeje juon hypothesis ejjab dedeḷok an function in ṃwil.

sandbox.add_phase_desc.tr: Kobaik juon phase ekāāl ippān data point ko aṃ make.

confirm.delete_self_check.en: Delete the self-check from ${when}? This can't be undone.
confirm.delete_self_check.tr: Joḷọk self-check eo jān ${when}? Eban maroñ bar oktak.

maintenance.probe_schedule_label_v2.tr: Tier ko an Probe Maintenance Standard ABA
